title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Hitachi India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Hitachi India
jsonLd.description:
We at Hitachi India are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Hitachi India:
Hitachi India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hitachi India!
